items.text: Best green chile in the city, hands down. We eat here every week.
items.author: Michelle R.

items.text: The carne adovada is the real deal. Tastes like my grandma used to make.
items.author: Antonio S.

items.text: Great food but the wait can be long on weekends. Worth it though.
items.author: Karen L.

items.text: We drove down from Santa Fe just for the enchiladas. Did not disappoint.
items.author: Brian T.

items.text: Friendly staff and huge portions. The sopapillas alone are reason to come back.
items.author: Lisa M.
